title: Add OtakuBox Bot to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [OtakuBox Bot](https://badamchuk.github.io/otakubox/) to bots
- OtakuBox Bot is a Telegram bot for anime fans that uses the Pollinations.ai API.

Fixes #10234

gist.headline: OtakuBox joins the swarm
gist.blurb: A new Telegram bot for anime fans just landed in the community showcase. OtakuBox uses Pollinations to bring anime magic straight to your chats.
gist.summary: Added OtakuBox, a Telegram bot for anime fans powered by the Pollinations API, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use OtakuBox from our community directory to generate anime content directly in Telegram.
gist.visual_concept: Combine Telegram/messaging motifs (paper airplane) with anime elements and the Pollinations bee. A cozy setup where Polly the bee interacts with a cute robot (representing the bot) that displays anime-style features.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny anime headband, handing a glowing blue paper airplane to a chunky retro robot. The robot has a CRT monitor head displaying a cute pixel anime face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny anime headband, handing a glowing blue paper airplane to a chunky retro robot.
